standard_prompts.name: Full SaaS CRM
standard_prompts.prompt: Build a CRM with login, contacts, dashboard, role-based access, and premium plan with payments. Admins can see analytics.

standard_prompts.name: E-learning Platform
standard_prompts.prompt: An LMS where teachers can upload courses, students can enroll, and there are assessments with auto-grading.

standard_prompts.name: Hospital Management
standard_prompts.prompt: System for doctors to manage patient records, appointments, and prescriptions with a nurse role for vitals.

standard_prompts.name: Inventory Tracker
standard_prompts.prompt: Track warehouse stock, multiple locations, suppliers, and auto-reorder when stock is below 10 units.

standard_prompts.name: Project Workspace
standard_prompts.prompt: A Trello-like app with boards, cards, comments, file attachments, and team permissions.

edge_cases.name: Highly Vague
edge_cases.prompt: Build a cool social network for pets.

edge_cases.name: Conflicting Requirements
edge_cases.prompt: A bank app where transactions are completely anonymous but admins must track every user identity for KYC.

edge_cases.name: Extreme Complexity
edge_cases.prompt: A multi-tenant marketplace for fractal art with NFT integration, bidding, escrow, and a complex royalty distribution engine.

edge_cases.name: System Stress
edge_cases.prompt: Generate a database with 500 tables and 5000 API endpoints for a simple todo list.
